title: Data & Analytics Platform
subtitle: Real-time analytics and cloud infrastructure for an enterprise client
description: End-to-end data platform with real-time processing, interactive dashboards, and automated cloud infrastructure.

content.overview: A full-stack data platform combining real-time analytics, interactive reporting, and automated cloud infrastructure for an enterprise environment.
content.challenge: The client needed a unified platform that could handle high-volume data processing, provide actionable insights through dashboards, and run reliably on scalable cloud infrastructure.
content.solution: We built an integrated solution covering data ingestion, processing pipelines, interactive dashboards, and fully automated CI/CD with container orchestration.

features.title: Real-time data processing
features.description: High-throughput pipelines with millisecond response times

features.title: Automated infrastructure
features.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerized deployments, and monitoring

features.title: Scalable architecture
features.description: Kubernetes orchestration with observability built in
